RESOURCE_VIEW_CACHE_TTL.description: TTL in seconds for the view-result cache in apply_view(). 0 disables caching.

DUCKDB_JOB_DIR.description: Directory for transient per-job DuckDB files created by BaseChunkedDuckDBJob. Default is sibling of QUERY_SPOOL_DIR default (tmp/query_spool/../duckdb_jobs = tmp/duckdb_jobs). Use an absolute path on a named volume in Docker. Must not overlap with QUERY_SPOOL_DIR. Added by unified-query-core-infra.

EAP_ALARM_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified EapAlarmJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob). Default 'on' (AC-1 parity tests pass). When 'on'/'true'/'1', enqueues via enqueue_query_job + EapAlarmJob with always-async 503 decision tree (sync_fallback_allowed=False). When 'off'/'false'/'0', falls back to legacy run_eap_alarm_query_job. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

PRODUCTION_HISTORY_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified ProductionHistoryJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P2 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', production_history route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('production_history_unified') with sync_fallback_allowed=True; always_async=False. When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy pandas BQE path. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

REJECT_HISTORY_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified RejectHistoryJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P2 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', reject_history route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('reject_unified') with sync_fallback_allowed=True; always_async=False; requires_cross_chunk_reduction=True. When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy enqueue_reject_query path. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

RESOURCE_HISTORY_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified ResourceHistoryBaseJob + ResourceHistoryOeeJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P3 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', export route enqueues two RQ jobs (always_async=True, sync_fallback_allowed=False); degraded → 503. When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy export_csv Oracle read + iterrows path. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

MATERIAL_TRACE_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified MaterialTraceJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P4 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', material-trace query route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('material-trace-unified') with always_async=True and sync_fallback_allowed=False; async unavailable -> 503 (no sync fallback). When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy _execute_batched_query_to_parquet path. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

DOWNTIME_USE_UNIFIED_JOB.description: Feature flag selecting the unified DowntimeJob path (BaseChunkedDuckDBJob, P5 migration). Default 'on'. When 'on'/'true'/'1', downtime-analysis route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('downtime-unified') with always_async=True and sync_fallback_allowed=False. When 'off'/'false'/'0', legacy _bridge_jobid Path B pd.merge via execute_downtime_query_job. Default promoted to on 2026-06-20.

QUERY_TOOL_USE_RQ.description: Feature flag enabling RQ async dispatch for query-tool equipment-period endpoint (query-path-c-elimination-cleanup, P5). When 'on'/'true'/'1' and classify_query_cost returns ASYNC, route enqueues via enqueue_query_job('query-tool') and returns 202+job_id. When 'off'/'false'/'0' (default), inline sync path unchanged (AC-2). Added by query-path-c-elimination-cleanup.

WIP_WORKER_QUEUE.description: RQ queue name for WIP detail async jobs. Must match --queues arg of the running WIP detail worker. Default 'wip-detail-query'. Added by wip-rq-worker-chunks-cleanup.

WIP_JOB_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Maximum seconds a single RQ WIP detail job may run. Positive integer string. Default '1800'. Added by wip-rq-worker-chunks-cleanup.

WIP_SPOOL_TTL.description: Redis spool metadata TTL (seconds) for WIP detail queries. Default '72000' (20h). Added by wip-rq-worker-chunks-cleanup.
